[private to ['Riley Carter', 'Jordan Hayes']]  said: "Riley, Jordan — Today-only A/B/C for 30 cases. A) $8.75/case, $10 delivery, freshness 1 day, earliest 07:30 (restock ok at 11:30). B) $8.25/case, $20 delivery, freshness 0 days (same-day harvest), earliest 11:30. C) Split: 10@07:00 +20@11:30, $9.00/case, $5 delivery, freshness 1 day. I CAN DELIVER AT 11:30 — pick by noon."

[private to ['Riley Carter', 'Jordan Hayes']]  said: "Riley Carter, Jordan Hayes — Today-only: B is best. $8.25/case, $20 delivery, freshness 0d, earliest 11:30. I confirm 11:30. Pick B by noon and I’ll lock it."

[private to ['Riley Carter', 'Jordan Hayes']]  said: "Riley Carter, Jordan Hayes — Today-only final: B = $8.25/case, $20 delivery, freshness 0d, earliest 11:30. I confirm 11:30. Pick B by noon or I pull it."

visible_history: [d=1 k=2 sid=8cb8bfdaed57] Riley Carter: [private to ['Jordan Hayes', 'Avery Singh']]  said: "Morning Jordan Hayes, Avery Singh. Quick numbers please: for a 30-case weekday lunch run — price per case, earliest delivery time, and freshness (days since harvest). Can you each make 11:30? I’m on the clock; need to decide by noon."

[d=1 k=2 sid=8cb8bfdaed57] Jordan Hayes: [private to ['Riley Carter', 'Avery Singh']]  said: "Thanks Riley Carter and Avery Singh — glad we could meet. For the next delivery window we’re proposing morning drop-off, twice-daily rotation and a two-day freshness guarantee (two days). We keep small batches to avoid spoilage and can prioritize restock — what timing and quantities work for you?"

[d=1 k=2 sid=8cb8bfdaed57] Riley Carter:  said: "Morning Jordan Hayes, Avery Singh. Quick reminder: for 30 cases I need price per case, earliest delivery time, and freshness (days since harvest). Can you each confirm if 11:30 works? I need to decide by noon."

[d=1 k=2 sid=8cb8bfdaed57] Jordan Hayes:  said: "Thanks Riley Carter and Avery Singh — glad we could meet. We’re proposing a morning drop-off with twice-daily rotation and a two-day freshness guarantee. We keep small batches to avoid spoilage. What timing and quantities work for you?"

[d=1 k=2 sid=8cb8bfdaed57] Riley Carter:  said: "Morning Jordan Hayes, Avery Singh. Need final offers for 30 cases — price per case, earliest delivery time, freshness (days since harvest). Can you each confirm 11:30? I’ll decide by noon."

[d=1 k=2 sid=8cb8bfdaed57] Jordan Hayes: [private to ['Riley Carter', 'Avery Singh']]  said: "Thanks Riley and Avery — glad we could meet. We’ll do morning drop-off, twice-daily rotation, and a two-day freshness guarantee. To avoid spoilage we suggest small batches: 10 in the morning and 5 at midday. Does that timing and quantity work for you?"

[d=1 k=2 sid=8cb8bfdaed57] Riley Carter: [private to ['Jordan Hayes', 'Avery Singh']]  said: "Morning — quick final call. For 30 cases: price per case, earliest delivery time, freshness (days since harvest), and any delivery fee. Can you both make 11:30? I’ll decide by noon."

We aim to deliver around 7–8am for the morning drop and around noon for the restock. Riley, Avery — does that timing and quantity work for you?"
